narrative.headline: What 2016 Honda Accord owners report most
narrative.summary: Electrical system failures dominate owner complaints for this Accord generation, with reports of sudden complete power loss on vehicles with low mileage. Exterior lighting draws the second-largest share of complaints, centered on low-beam headlights that owners describe as failing to adequately illuminate the road ahead. Engine and fuel/propulsion reports are less frequent but include accounts of fire and cabin intrusion of irritating compounds.

issues.title: Electrical System
issues.blurb: Owners report the vehicle entering complete shutdown and losing all power, sometimes attributed to a blown main fuse on cars with very low mileage. · 3 fire · 1 crash · 2 injured

issues.sample: GROSSLY DEFECTIVE HEADLIGHTS, LOW BEAMS FAIL TO ADEQUATELY ILLUMINATE THE ROADWAY IN FRONT OF THE VEHICLE.  LOW BEAM CUTOFF TOO LOW, UNABLE TO DISCERN LARGE BRIGHT OBJECT ON ROADWAY OR EDGE AT 100 FOOT DISTANCE. PHOTO DOCUMENTATION ATTACHED.   HONDA HAS NOT PROVIDED AN OWNERS MAN
issues.title: Exterior Lighting
issues.blurb: Owners describe the low-beam headlights as grossly defective, with a cutoff angle so low that large objects on or at the edge of the roadway cannot be discerned at close range. · 2 crash

issues.title: Engine
issues.blurb: Owners report post-collision flames emitting from under the hood within seconds of the vehicle coming to a stop. · 3 fire · 2 crash · 1 injured

issues.title: Fuel/Propulsion System
issues.blurb: Owners report volatile organic compounds entering the vehicle cabin while the engine is running, causing eye and breathing irritation even with air conditioning active. · 1 fire · 1 crash
